info.name: C-Address Onboarding Bridge API
info.description: Runnable API reference generated from api/src/openapi/spec.ts.

item.name: Get a fee quote for a funding transaction

request.description: Returns estimated fee, expected receive amount, and exchange rate for a given asset and amount. Results are cached for 30 seconds.

originalRequest.description: Returns estimated fee, expected receive amount, and exchange rate for a given asset and amount. Results are cached for 30 seconds.
Returns estimated fee, expected receive amount, and exchange rate for a given asset and amount. Results are cached for 30 seconds.

request.description: Submits a pre-signed Stellar transaction XDR to the Soroban bridge contract. Use POST /api/v2/fund/prepare to build the transaction first.

originalRequest.description: Submits a pre-signed Stellar transaction XDR to the Soroban bridge contract. Use POST /api/v2/fund/prepare to build the transaction first.

item.name: Prepare an unsigned funding transaction for signing

request.description: Simulates the contract call and returns an unsigned transaction XDR for the client to sign. Sign this with your wallet and POST it to /api/v2/fund.

response.name: 200 Unsigned transaction ready for signing

originalRequest.description: Simulates the contract call and returns an unsigned transaction XDR for the client to sign. Sign this with your wallet and POST it to /api/v2/fund.

request.description: Returns the current on-chain status of a Soroban transaction. Poll this endpoint until status is `success` or `failed`.

request.description: Creates an API key with specified scopes. The raw key is only returned once — store it securely.
